audit_items.proof_trace: The file thr_thr.c consists entirely of thin one-liner wrappers around Solaris thread API functions (thr_*, mutex_*, cond_*). No function in the file contains any explicit pointer dereference (no *ptr or ptr->field expressions); all pointer parameters are forwarded by value to the underlying OS library. The property 'no null pointer deref in thr_thr.c' is trivially satisfied because the file performs zero pointer dereferences at the C source level.
